name: django-smartbase-admin
documentation:
# django-smartbase-admin
SmartBase Admin application for Django.

functions.name: django_smartbase_admin.utils._pluck_classes
documentation:
Gets a list of class names and a list of modules to pick from.
For each class name, will return the class from the first module that has a
matching class.

methods.name: django_smartbase_admin.engine.actions.SBAdminFormViewAction.resolve_url
documentation: self.url and self.action_id is resolved in side django_smartbase_admin.engine.admin_base_view.SBAdminBaseView.process_actions

class_variables.name: django_smartbase_admin.engine.fake_inline.SBAdminFakeInlineMixin.path_to_parent_instance_id
documentation: path to parent instance id in fake inline model

methods.name: django_smartbase_admin.admin.admin_base.SBTranslatableModelFormMetaclass.__new__
documentation: patched due to Parler issue fetching formfield_callback from attributes istead of Meta object

methods.name: django_smartbase_admin.engine.filter_widgets.DateFilterWidget.get_range_from_value
documentation:
Get date-range from string filter value

:returns: array, is_range

classes.name: django_smartbase_admin.templatetags.base.InclusionSBAdminNode
documentation:
Template tag that allows its template to be overridden per model, per app,
or globally.

functions.name: django_smartbase_admin.templatetags.sb_admin_tags.get_log_entry_message
documentation:
If change_message is a JSON structure, interpret it as a change
string, properly translated.

methods.name: django_smartbase_admin.actions.admin_action_list.SBAdminListAction.get_search_results
documentation:
Return a tuple containing a queryset to implement the search
and a boolean indicating if the results may contain duplicates.
